name: All-America Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt the butter in a small pan and set aside.
3. Peel and core the apples, then shred them in a food processor or on the coarse side of a vegetable grater. Grind the coriander seeds with a mortar and pestle or spice grinder. Set aside.
4. Beat the egg in a mixing bowl. Add the honey, milk, and melted butter, and mix well.
5. Add the shredded apples to the mixture and combine thoroughly.
6. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) and add them to the apple mixture. Mix until just combined.
7. Stir in the vanilla extract.
8. Pour the batter into a nonstick 8 1/2-inch x 4 1/2-inch x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan.
9. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until lightly browned and firm to the touch.
10. Transfer from the oven to a cooling rack for 5 minutes. Turn out onto the rack and cool for several hours before slicing.
{Calories per portion: 70}
SOURCE: Slim Snacks (pg. 187)
